About me

Marketing that respects the P&L.

Hi, I'm Leong Chin, a Singapore-based growth marketing leader who specialises in e-commerce and marketing. I built and led the marketing function for a multi-brand consumer electronics distributorship representing Dreame, MOVA and Levoit, helping the business grow and scale profitably. Before that, I co-founded and ran a D2C gaming chair brand, APOL Singapore, scaling it to S$1.5M in annual revenue, profitably, within two years.

My approach is simple: start with the unit economics, test relentlessly, and let the data decide. I combine strategic ownership with hands-on execution across Shopify, Meta, CRM, retail and PR.

360 Marketing GTM Strategy P&L Ownership Performance Marketing Shopify & E-commerce CRM & Lifecycle Email Retail & Event Activation KOL & Influencer SEO & Content PR & Media

Why me

What value can I bring?

Five reasons I operate differently from most marketers.

01

A business owner's lens, not just a marketer's

Sales is vanity, profit is sanity.

As co-founder of APOL Singapore and the founding marketing member at Dasher, more than four years of running businesses taught me to read the whole P&L, not just the campaign dashboard. Early on I learned how easily strong top-line numbers can mask thin margins: one brand was posting S$1M in sales while contribution margin before overheads sat close to break-even, as growth leaned heavily on discounting and paid reach.

So I built a framework to protect profit while scaling, using contribution margin and aMER (advertising margin efficiency) thresholds to decide where budget earned its place. That lifted the brand's margin from low single digits to roughly 20% within three to four months, and those thresholds are now how I evaluate every new channel before committing spend. Most marketers stay fixated on their own function; I keep a 360 view of the business.

02

The operator setup

I don't just plan from a deck. I go hands-on with the team to get things done, from creative briefs and media buying to CRM flows and on-ground event execution. Strategy and delivery sit in the same pair of hands.

03

A proven track record

I scaled my own business to S$1.5M within two years, profitably. In Dasher, together with my team, I helped grow Dreame into one of Singapore's leading robot vacuum brands within two years, anchored by record-breaking flagship launches at IT Show and COMEX, and the Dreame website grew from S$55k to S$200k within five months.

04

360 marketing under one roof

I own the full funnel end to end, across e-commerce, performance, retail activation, PR, KOL and CRM, so campaigns work as one integrated system instead of disconnected channel silos. That breadth means fewer handoffs, tighter feedback loops and faster decisions.

05

From GTM concept to proven results

I don't stop at the strategy deck. I conceptualise the full go-to-market, then turn it into live campaigns that deliver. That is how Dreame's IT Show and COMEX launches broke records and the Westgate opening beat its target by 20%.

Before you hire

Why you can hire with confidence

What kind of roles am I looking for?

Marketing lead and senior marketing roles in D2C and e-commerce, ideally where I can own the full funnel and the commercial number rather than a single channel.

What makes me different from other marketers?

I run marketing with a business owner's lens. Having co-founded a company and owned a P&L, I optimise for contribution margin and aMER, not vanity reach. I also cover 360 marketing end to end instead of a single specialism.

Am I more strategy or execution?

Both. I set the strategy and go hands-on with the team to ship it, from media buying and CRM to on-ground event execution.

What does my marketing stack look like?

Shopify, Meta and Google Ads, TikTok, Google Analytics, and Omnisend or Klaviyo for EDM. The tools matter less than how I use them: full-funnel acquisition, conversion rate optimisation and retention, with budget moved toward what the data proves converts. I also work directly with brand HQ teams on asset localisation.

Where am I based and my preferred contact?

I'm a Singapore citizen, and the fastest way to reach me is email or WhatsApp below.
